Welcome to another profound session of TextWorld! Here is how to play! Your first objective is to attempt to venture west. Next, attempt to go to the north. And then, attempt to go to the east. And then, venture east. With that accomplished, recover the coin from the floor of the bedroom. And if you do that, you're the winner!

-= Cookhouse =-
You're now in the cookhouse.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going west.
